name: rpglitch-perchance
description: RPGlitch - AI-powered storytelling platform for Perchance

scripts.build:watch: node build-perchance.js && echo 'Watching for changes...' && nodemon --watch RPGlitch --ext html,js --exec 'node build-perchance.js'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo '✅ Build complete! Copy build/RPGlitch-perchance.html to Perchance.'

author: RPGlitch Team
